renmods 0.0.0.9000

renmods

An R package to download, import, and filter data from B.C.’s Environmental Monitoring Data System (EnMoDs) into R. ‘renmods’ package replaces ‘rems’ to support the new data system released in March 2026.

The EnMoDs dataset is licensed under the Open Government Licence - British Columbia.

Features

  • Download ENMODS data and cache locally
  • Simple connections to the ENMODS database, only to as much data as required to speed up load times.

Installation

Usage

See the Getting Started Tutorial for details

Project Status

Very first stages of development.

Getting Help or Reporting an Issue

To report bugs/issues/feature requests, please file an issue.

How to Contribute

If you would like to contribute to the package, please see our CONTRIBUTING guidelines.

Please note that this project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By participating in this project you agree to abide by its terms.
